comment: Flow_FinalizeEvaBox (§5.10 / phase-2 M2.C+M2.D). EVA + Box finalize in unison inside one Scope. Box folder = UPPERCASE Case/PO; EVA uses lowercase - same identity, two casings. Photo order = 2 previews first (overview w/ full registration + damage closeup) then ALL photos incl. those two again (Evidence sequenceIndex asc). The Sentry REST submit is a TWO-REQUEST photo flow inside the evasentry Function (confirmed against Sentry API v1.2 PDF pp.13,21-23): the 2 preview photos ride as EVA Files {Name,Extension,Data} on POST /Instruction/Inspection (creates the claim, returns Id), then the full ordered set rides on POST /Note/SubmitNote matched by VehReg (+ClmNo) - so the flow passes body/vrm (cr1bd_vrm) and body/clmNo (cr1bd_caseref). EVA_API_ENABLED gates the TRANSPORT (Sentry REST via cr1bd_evasentry when true; JSON drag-drop export staged to Box when false - M1 default + PERMANENT fallback) not the finalization. The Sentry REST token lifecycle lives INSIDE the evasentry Function (Power Platform custom connectors cannot do the OAuth2 client-credentials grant - Microsoft Learn), keyed by function-key; the flow never reads EVA_CLIENT_SECRET. Idempotent by cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash (stamped LAST; the Function also dedups by payload hash in-process). BoxArchiveRootId is a flow parameter, never a hardcoded live Box id. [BUILD]. BOX CONTRACT (verified Microsoft Learn connectors/box + connectors/azureblobconnector 2026-06-20): the first-party Box connector is class STANDARD and has NO CreateFolder op - the UPPERCASE Case/PO folder is created IMPLICITLY by writing into CreateFile's folderPath. Box CreateFile params are folderPath/name/binary body (folderId is a TRIGGER param, not a CreateFile param). S2 FIX: each photo is read from Azure Blob via Get blob content using path (V2) (cr1bd_evidenceblob, dataset=AccountNameFromSettings) and its REAL bytes go to Box - previously the cr1bd_storagepath PATH STRING was uploaded as the body (silent corruption: a tiny text file, not the image). The .eva.json drag-drop body is a JSON string = already content, so it needs no blob read. ACTIVATION [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: bind cr1bd_box (live Box, interactive OAuth - the connector supports no JWT/CCG) + cr1bd_evidenceblob (Azure Blob, account cespkevidstdev01, access-key, dataset=AccountNameFromSettings) + cr1bd_evasentry, set BoxArchiveRootId (or root the Box connection at the archive parent so folderPath is just /<CASEPO>/), inject EVA test Client_Id/Secret into Key Vault, set EVA_REQUEST_FROM (EVA-supplied contact code) app setting, confirm folderPath auto-creates the UPPERCASE folder + the UPPERCASE casing (B5/H6), flip EVA_API_ENABLED=true in TEST only, run a parity test (drag-drop==API) before any prod cutover. Box can go live on the drag-drop transport (EVA_API_ENABLED=false) BEFORE the Sentry REST path exists. Claude never injects secrets, binds a live account, or flips the prod gate.

metadata.description: Parent Box folder id for archives. Flow parameter; bound by the user at activation. NEVER a hardcoded live Box id.

manual.comment: Invoked when staff request submit (the Code App writes a 'submit requested' signal; the Code App never calls EVA/Box directly).

Init_evaPayload12.comment: The schema-valid 12-field EVA JSON in contract order, built by the SAME serializer the Code App uses (eva-export.ts / eva-payload.schema.json) - byte-identical drag-drop body and API body. vrm/reference are NOT in the 12.

Set_gate_EVA_API_ENABLED.comment: M1 default false -> JSON drag-drop export path (permanent fallback).

Guard_already_finalized.comment: Idempotency latch: re-running finalize for an already-submitted payload hash must not double-submit or re-create the folder.

Order_evidence.comment: Image Evidence accepted for EVA, ascending sequenceIndex (2 previews seeded at index 0,1 then full sequence incl. those two again).

parameters.$filter: _cr1bd_caseid_value eq @{variables('caseId')} and cr1bd_kind eq 100000000 and cr1bd_acceptedforeva eq true and cr1bd_excluded eq false

Upload_photos_in_eva_order.comment: repetitions=1 preserves EVA upload order: 2 previews first, then full sequence incl. those two. The UPPERCASE Case/PO folder is created IMPLICITLY by writing into CreateFile's folderPath (the first-party Box connector has NO CreateFolder op — confirmed on Microsoft Learn connectors/box 2026-06-20; the deleted Create_box_folder_UPPERCASE invented one). Each photo is a Get_blob_content_v2 -> Copy_evidence_to_box pair (S2 content-bind fix).

Get_blob_content_v2.comment: S2 FIX: read the REAL photo bytes from the evidence Azure Blob before the Box upload. cr1bd_storagepath is an Azure Blob PATH STRING (e.g. /evidence/intake/<messageId>/IMG.jpg), NOT bytes — uploading it as the Box body wrote a tiny text file, not the image (silent corruption). Get blob content using path (V2) (operationId GetFileContentByPath_V2; the non-V2 GetFileContentByPath is DEPRECATED) returns binary; dataset=AccountNameFromSettings matches the classify-persist storage convention (account cespkevidstdev01, access-key auth). Implicit chunking 50MB no-chunk / up to 1024MB chunked, so the read side comfortably exceeds the 75MB Box write ceiling. [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: bind cr1bd_evidenceblob (Azure Blob, access key) at activation so this read works.

Copy_evidence_to_box.comment: Box Create file (operationId CreateFile; verified params folderPath/name/body on Microsoft Learn connectors/box 2026-06-20 — there is NO folderId param on CreateFile, folderId was a TRIGGER param). folderPath = '/' + UPPERCASE Case/PO (e.g. EVA test26001 -> Box /TEST26001/) auto-creates the folder (SharePoint-style; CONFIRM on first live run — open question 1). body = the real blob bytes from Get_blob_content_v2 (S2 fix). Box known-issue #6: a same-name re-upload is an UPDATE not a 409, so the loop is resume-safe by filename. [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: bind cr1bd_box to the live Box account + set BoxArchiveRootId at activation; confirm Box honours the UPPERCASE casing (B5).

EVA_instruction_inspection.comment: Sentry REST path - the evasentry Function mints/caches the 5-min /Connect/token JWT and attaches the bearer SERVER-SIDE (Key Vault refs); this connector is function-keyed only. The Function maps evaPayload12 (the schema-valid 12-field core, byte-identical to the drag-drop body) to the PascalCase Instruction/Inspection model and performs the TWO-REQUEST photo submission server-side (2 previews on /Instruction/Inspection, then the full set on /Note/SubmitNote). payloadHash echoes the idempotency latch; casePo (lowercase) -> ExternalRef; vrm (cr1bd_vrm) -> VehReg and clmNo (cr1bd_caseref) -> ClmNo are the claim keys the Note request uses to attach the remaining photos. Runs only when EVA_API_ENABLED=true. STAGED (plan: confirm on EVA TEST then enable): base-64 photo bytes are not yet streamed to the Function via body/images - the flow reads each photo's bytes from Azure Blob (Get_blob_content_v2) and archives them to the Box folder, so today EVA renders the 12-field core and the photos live in the Box archive. To attach photos via the API, reuse the Get_blob_content_v2 bytes (already read per photo for the Box upload, which proves they are reachable) and pass body/images as [{sequenceIndex, content(base64), role, filename, registrationVisible}] - the Function already orders/splits them. [RESERVED-FOR-USER] to enable/cutover.

Stage_drag_drop_json.comment: M1 default: emit the schema-valid 12-field JSON for staff drag-drop into EVA. Same serializer as the Code App - byte-identical. Box Create file with the path-based contract (folderPath, not folderId): folderPath = '/' + UPPERCASE Case/PO so the .eva.json lands in the SAME single per-case folder as the photos; name = lowercase Case/PO + '.eva.json'. A JSON string is already text content, so NO Get_blob_content is needed here (only the photo bytes needed the S2 fix).

Stamp_finalized_hash.comment: Stamp LAST = idempotency latch. status box_synced=100000009 (terminal). A partial failure leaves the hash unstamped so a re-run resumes cleanly.
